/usr/bin/cc CMakeFiles/MyRaylibGame.dir/src_new/game.c.o CMakeFiles/MyRaylibGame.dir/src_new/game_renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/MyRaylibGame.dir/src_new/main.c.o CMakeFiles/MyRaylibGame.dir/src_new/resource.c.o -o MyRaylibGame  raylib/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
